policy_claim: Passwords must be a minimum of 14 characters, including uppercase, lowercase, numerals, and at least one symbol.
corpus_claim: New employees must create a password of at least 8 characters for their company account.

policy_claim: All remote access to internal systems must be conducted exclusively over the company-approved VPN (GlobalProtect).
corpus_claim: You can access internal tools like email and the project tracker without VPN from trusted home networks.

policy_claim: Split-tunnel VPN is disabled for remote access; all traffic is routed through the corporate gateway.
corpus_claim: Split tunnelling is available on request for employees who experience bandwidth issues.

policy_claim: Policy exceptions are valid for a maximum of 90 days and must be reviewed prior to expiry.
corpus_claim: Policy exceptions may be granted for up to 180 days at the discretion of the CISO.

policy_claim: Employees must use 1Password Teams for all non-privileged credentials.
corpus_claim: Employees should use LastPass to store and manage their work credentials.

policy_claim: Employees must not attempt to investigate or remediate a suspected security incident independently.
corpus_claim: Employees should attempt basic remediation steps before escalating a suspected incident.

policy_claim: CrowdStrike Falcon (EDR) must be installed and reporting to the corporate console on all devices.
corpus_claim: Your laptop will be set up with Windows Defender as the primary endpoint security tool.

policy_claim: Security incidents must be reported immediately to the Security Operations Centre (SOC) via soc@company.com or the incident portal.
corpus_claim: The security team can be reached at security@company.com for incident reporting.

policy_claim: Full-disk encryption must be enabled on all devices (BitLocker for Windows, FileVault for macOS).
corpus_claim: Full-disk encryption is recommended but not mandatory for personally-owned devices enrolled in MDM.

policy_claim: Multi-factor authentication (MFA) via Microsoft Authenticator is mandatory for all VPN sessions.
corpus_claim: MFA setup is optional during your first 30 days while you get settled in.

policy_claim: Only company-issued devices or personally-owned devices formally enrolled in MDM may be used for remote access.
corpus_claim: Personal laptops may be used for remote work as long as they have up-to-date antivirus software.

policy_claim: Security incidents must be reported immediately to the Security Operations Centre (SOC) via soc@company.com or the incident portal.
corpus_claim: Security incidents should be reported to your line manager in the first instance.

policy_claim: Passwords must not be reused within the previous 12 cycles.
corpus_claim: Passwords must be changed every 60 days.
